listing.name: Vibe Diagram
listing.short_description: Self-contained HTML diagrams for complex ideas
listing.long_description: Turn architecture, workflows, sequences, state, debugging, design, decisions, and delivery acceptance into self-contained HTML diagrams.
starter_prompts: Create a self-contained HTML architecture diagram from this repository.
Turn this workflow into a responsive HTML diagram with exception paths.
Build an evidence-backed HTML diagram that separates facts, inference, and risks.
listing.release_notes: Initial skills-only plugin submission candidate for Vibe Diagram 0.1.0-rc.1.
